Ten test case: Mo man POS va kiem tra khu vuc CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Dang nhap, chon role ban hang, vao man tao don
Ket qua ky vong: Co khu vuc Chuong trinh khuyen mai (n)

Ten test case: Mo modal CTKM khi don chua co san pham
Buoc kiem thu: Click Chuong trinh khuyen mai khi gio hang rong
Ket qua ky vong: Modal mo hoac thong bao khong du dieu kien ro rang

Ten test case: Mo modal CTKM sau khi them san pham
Buoc kiem thu: Them san pham, click Chuong trinh khuyen mai
Ket qua ky vong: Modal Chuong trinh khuyen mai mo va tai danh sach

Ten test case: Kiem tra tab Theo don hang
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi CTKM/ dieu kien theo don hang

Ten test case: Kiem tra tab Theo san pham
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi CTKM theo tung san pham

Ten test case: Kiem tra trang thai dieu kien CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat bieu tuong/text dieu kien
Ket qua ky vong: Dieu kien co trang thai thoa/chua thoa

Ten test case: Ap dung CTKM theo don hang neu du dieu kien
Tien dieu kien: Co CTKM theo don hang du dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Tick CTKM theo don hang, bam Ap dung
Ket qua ky vong: Chiet khau khuyen mai hoac qua tang cap nhat

Ten test case: Ap dung CTKM theo san pham neu du dieu kien
Tien dieu kien: Co CTKM theo san pham du dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Tick CTKM theo san pham, bam Ap dung
Ket qua ky vong: Dong/san pham KM hien thi dung

Ten test case: Khong tu dong tick CTKM theo san pham
Tach chiet khau nhap tay va CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Nhap chiet khau don hang, quan sat tong quan
Ket qua ky vong: Chiet khau don hang va chiet khau khuyen mai tach rieng

Ten test case: Go CTKM khi don khong con du dieu kien
Tien dieu kien: Da ap dung CTKM neu co
Buoc kiem thu: Xoa san pham hoac doi so luong
Ket qua ky vong: CTKM/qua tang/dong KM bi go hoac yeu cau chon lai

Ten test case: Mo thanh toan sau khi ap dung/kiem tra CTKM
Ket qua ky vong: Tong giam gia dung, khong tao du lieu gia
